title: <div>3. Should the Scribe’s edits remain permanent, or should they be challengea
content:
3. Should the Scribe’s edits remain permanent, or should they be challengeable?

✔ If permanent, the Scribe has immense power.
✔ If challengeable, another player may “correct” a lie if they detect it.

🚀 Version 6.6 now finalizes chaos archetypes, weekly curses, structured literary artifacts, Scribe influence, and expanding the RPG mechanics.
🔥 Are we locking this in? 🎮📖

📌 Version 6.7 – Curse Nullifier Archetype, Mid-Semester Shake-Up, Literary Items Expansion, and Scribe Rules Refinement


🚀 This iteration adds a dedicated curse-nullifier archetype, a structured mid-semester power rebalance event, an expanded literary artifact system, and finalizes the Scribe’s editorial role with layered approvals.

📜 1. The Curse Nullifier Archetype – The Purifier

📜 A single player can take on the role of “The Purifier,” capable of lifting a weekly curse.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 336 (chunk 336/555)
